name: Pizza Margherita
teaser: A classic Italian pizza with fresh tomatoes, mozzarella, and basil
steps: Preheat oven to 250°C (480°F) with a pizza stone if available
Roll out the dough on a floured surface to desired thickness
Crush tomatoes by hand and spread evenly over the dough
Tear mozzarella into pieces and distribute over the pizza
Drizzle with olive oil and season with salt
Bake for 10-12 minutes until crust is golden and cheese is bubbly
Top with fresh basil leaves and serve immediately

name: Chicken Caesar Salad
teaser: Crisp romaine lettuce with grilled chicken, parmesan, and creamy Caesar dressing
steps: Season chicken breasts with salt and pepper
Grill chicken for 6-7 minutes per side until cooked through
Let chicken rest for 5 minutes, then slice
Wash and chop romaine lettuce into bite-sized pieces
Toss lettuce with Caesar dressing
Top with sliced chicken, croutons, and shaved parmesan
Squeeze fresh lemon juice over the salad and serve

name: Avocado Toast with Poached Eggs
teaser: Creamy avocado on crusty bread topped with perfectly poached eggs
steps: Bring a pot of water to a gentle simmer and add vinegar
Toast the sourdough bread until golden
Mash avocado with salt, pepper, and a drizzle of olive oil
Create a whirlpool in the water and crack eggs into the center
Poach eggs for 3-4 minutes until whites are set
Spread mashed avocado on toast
Top each toast with a poached egg and sprinkle with red pepper flakes

name: Beef Tacos
teaser: Seasoned ground beef in crispy shells with fresh toppings
steps: Brown ground beef in a skillet over medium-high heat
Add diced onion and cook until softened
Stir in taco seasoning and 100ml water
Simmer for 5 minutes until sauce thickens
Warm taco shells according to package directions
Fill shells with seasoned beef
Top with cheese, lettuce, tomatoes, sour cream, and salsa

name: Greek Yogurt Parfait
teaser: Layers of creamy yogurt, crunchy granola, and fresh berries
steps: Spoon a layer of Greek yogurt into serving glasses
Add a layer of granola
Add a layer of mixed berries
Repeat layers until glasses are full
Drizzle honey over the top
Sprinkle with chia seeds and serve immediately

name: Spaghetti Carbonara
teaser: Classic Roman pasta with creamy egg sauce, pancetta, and pecorino
steps: Bring a large pot of salted water to boil and cook spaghetti
Cut pancetta into small cubes and fry until crispy
Mix egg yolks with grated pecorino and plenty of black pepper
Reserve 1 cup pasta water, then drain spaghetti
Add hot pasta to the pancetta pan (off heat)
Quickly stir in the egg mixture, adding pasta water to create a creamy sauce
Serve immediately with extra pecorino and black pepper

name: Tomato Basil Soup
teaser: Velvety smooth tomato soup with fresh basil and a hint of cream
steps: Halve tomatoes and roast at 200°C for 20 minutes
Sauté diced onion and garlic in olive oil until soft
Add roasted tomatoes and vegetable stock
Simmer for 15 minutes
Blend until smooth using an immersion blender
Stir in cream and season with salt and pepper
Garnish with fresh basil and serve with crusty bread

name: Chicken Stir-Fry
teaser: Quick and colorful stir-fry with tender chicken and crisp vegetables
steps: Slice chicken and vegetables into bite-sized pieces
Heat sesame oil in a wok over high heat
Stir-fry chicken until golden, about 5 minutes
Add garlic and ginger, cook for 30 seconds
Add vegetables and stir-fry for 3-4 minutes
Pour in soy sauce and toss to coat
Serve immediately over steamed rice

name: Overnight Oats
teaser: No-cook oats soaked overnight for a quick, healthy breakfast
steps: Combine oats, milk, and yogurt in a jar
Add maple syrup and a pinch of cinnamon
Stir well and refrigerate overnight
In the morning, slice banana on top
Add a dollop of peanut butter
Stir and enjoy cold or microwave for 2 minutes if preferred

name: Grilled Salmon with Asparagus
teaser: Perfectly grilled salmon fillet with tender asparagus and lemon butter
steps: Preheat grill to medium-high heat
Season salmon with salt, pepper, and olive oil
Trim asparagus and toss with olive oil and garlic
Grill salmon for 4-5 minutes per side
Grill asparagus for 3-4 minutes, turning occasionally
Melt butter with lemon juice and chopped dill
Plate salmon and asparagus, drizzle with lemon butter sauce

name: Veggie Wrap
teaser: Fresh vegetables and hummus wrapped in a soft tortilla
steps: Spread hummus generously over each tortilla
Slice cucumber and carrot into thin strips
Slice avocado
Layer vegetables and mixed greens on the tortilla
Crumble feta cheese on top
Season with salt and pepper
Roll up tightly, tucking in the sides
Cut in half diagonally and serve

name: Mushroom Risotto
teaser: Creamy Italian rice dish with earthy mushrooms and parmesan
steps: Heat stock in a saucepan and keep warm
Sauté sliced mushrooms in butter until golden, set aside
In the same pan, cook diced onion in olive oil until soft
Add rice and toast for 2 minutes
Pour in wine and stir until absorbed
Add stock one ladle at a time, stirring constantly
Continue for 18-20 minutes until rice is creamy
Stir in mushrooms, parmesan, and fresh thyme

name: French Toast
teaser: Golden, crispy slices of bread soaked in cinnamon egg batter
steps: Whisk together eggs, milk, vanilla, and cinnamon
Heat butter in a large skillet over medium heat
Dip each bread slice in the egg mixture, coating both sides
Fry for 3-4 minutes per side until golden brown
Serve with maple syrup and fresh berries
Dust with powdered sugar if desired

name: Thai Green Curry
teaser: Aromatic coconut curry with chicken, vegetables, and Thai basil
steps: Heat a splash of coconut milk in a wok until it separates
Add curry paste and fry for 1-2 minutes until fragrant
Add chicken and cook until sealed
Pour in remaining coconut milk and bring to a simmer
Add vegetables and cook for 10 minutes
Season with fish sauce and palm sugar
Stir in Thai basil leaves
Serve over jasmine rice

name: Caprese Sandwich
teaser: Fresh mozzarella, tomatoes, and basil on crusty ciabatta
steps: Slice ciabatta roll in half horizontally
Drizzle olive oil on both cut sides
Layer sliced mozzarella on the bottom half
Add sliced tomatoes on top of the cheese
Season with salt and pepper
Add fresh basil leaves
Drizzle with balsamic glaze
Close sandwich and press gently

name: Beef Bourguignon
teaser: Rich French stew with tender beef, red wine, and aromatic vegetables
steps: Brown beef cubes in batches and set aside
Cook bacon until crispy, then sauté onions and carrots
Add garlic and tomato paste, cook for 1 minute
Return beef to pot and add wine and stock
Add herbs and bring to a simmer
Cover and cook in oven at 160°C for 2.5 hours
Add mushrooms in the last 30 minutes
Serve with mashed potatoes or crusty bread

name: Eggs Benedict
teaser: Poached eggs and Canadian bacon on English muffins with hollandaise
steps: Make hollandaise: whisk egg yolks over double boiler
Slowly add melted butter while whisking constantly
Add lemon juice and season, keep warm
Toast English muffins and warm Canadian bacon
Poach eggs in simmering water with vinegar
Assemble: muffin, bacon, poached egg
Spoon hollandaise over the top
Garnish with chives and serve immediately

name: Pad Thai
teaser: Classic Thai rice noodles with shrimp, peanuts, and tamarind sauce
steps: Soak rice noodles in warm water for 30 minutes
Mix tamarind paste, fish sauce, and palm sugar for sauce
Stir-fry shrimp until pink, set aside
Scramble eggs in the wok
Add drained noodles and sauce, toss well
Add shrimp, bean sprouts, and green onions
Serve topped with crushed peanuts and lime wedges

name: Minestrone Soup
teaser: Hearty Italian vegetable soup with pasta and white beans
steps: Dice carrots, celery, and zucchini
Sauté vegetables in olive oil until softened
Add tomatoes and stock, bring to a boil
Add parmesan rind for flavor
Simmer for 20 minutes
Add pasta and beans, cook until pasta is tender
Remove parmesan rind before serving
Top with fresh basil and grated parmesan

name: Shakshuka
teaser: Eggs poached in spiced tomato sauce with peppers and onions
steps: Sauté diced peppers and onion until soft
Add garlic and spices, cook for 1 minute
Pour in tomatoes and simmer for 15 minutes
Make 6 wells in the sauce
Crack an egg into each well
Cover and cook until eggs are set, about 8 minutes
Garnish with cilantro and serve with bread

name: Chicken Tikka Masala
teaser: Tender chicken in creamy, spiced tomato curry sauce
steps: Marinate chicken in yogurt with half the spices for 30 minutes
Grill or pan-fry chicken until charred
Sauté onions and garlic until golden
Add remaining spices and tomatoes
Simmer for 15 minutes
Stir in cream and add chicken
Cook for 10 more minutes
Garnish with cilantro and serve with rice

name: BLT Sandwich
teaser: Crispy bacon, fresh lettuce, and ripe tomatoes on toasted bread
steps: Cook bacon until crispy
Toast bread slices until golden
Spread mayonnaise on all slices
Layer lettuce on bottom slices
Add sliced tomatoes and season
Top with bacon strips
Close sandwiches and cut diagonally

name: Lamb Kebabs
teaser: Grilled marinated lamb skewers with Middle Eastern spices
steps: Mix onion, garlic, oil, and spices for marinade
Toss lamb in marinade and refrigerate for 2 hours
Thread lamb onto metal skewers
Preheat grill to high heat
Grill kebabs for 3-4 minutes per side
Rest for 5 minutes before serving
Serve with warm pita and tzatziki

name: Banana Pancakes
teaser: Fluffy pancakes studded with caramelized banana slices
steps: Mix flour, sugar, and baking powder
Whisk eggs and milk together
Combine wet and dry ingredients
Slice bananas
Heat butter in a pan over medium heat
Pour batter and add banana slices on top
Flip when bubbles form and cook until golden
Serve with maple syrup and extra banana

name: Shrimp Scampi
teaser: Garlic butter shrimp over linguine with white wine and lemon
steps: Cook linguine according to package directions
Sauté garlic in butter and olive oil
Add shrimp and cook until pink
Pour in white wine and lemon juice
Simmer for 2-3 minutes
Toss with drained pasta
Add parsley and red pepper flakes
Serve immediately with lemon wedges

name: Quinoa Buddha Bowl
teaser: Nourishing bowl with quinoa, roasted vegetables, and tahini dressing
steps: Cook quinoa according to package directions
Cube sweet potato and roast at 200°C for 25 minutes
Toss chickpeas with spices and roast alongside
Massage kale with olive oil and lemon
Make dressing: whisk tahini, lemon, and water
Assemble bowls with quinoa base
Top with vegetables, chickpeas, and avocado
Drizzle with tahini dressing

name: Lasagna Bolognese
teaser: Layers of pasta, rich meat sauce, and creamy béchamel
steps: Make Bolognese: brown beef, add vegetables and tomatoes, simmer 30 minutes
Make béchamel: melt butter, whisk in flour, add milk gradually
Season béchamel with nutmeg and parmesan
Layer: sauce, pasta, béchamel, repeat
Top final layer with extra béchamel and parmesan
Bake at 180°C for 45 minutes
Rest for 10 minutes before serving

name: Acai Bowl
teaser: Frozen acai blended smooth and topped with fresh fruits and granola
steps: Blend frozen acai with banana and almond milk
Pour thick mixture into a bowl
Arrange sliced banana on one side
Add fresh berries
Sprinkle granola on top
Drizzle with honey
Add chia seeds and serve immediately

name: Fish and Chips
teaser: Beer-battered cod with crispy golden chips and mushy peas
steps: Cut potatoes into thick chips and soak in cold water
Make batter: whisk flour and beer until smooth
Heat oil to 180°C
Par-fry chips for 5 minutes, drain
Dip fish in batter and fry until golden, about 6 minutes
Fry chips again until crispy
Mash peas with butter and mint
Serve with vinegar and lemon

name: Chicken Noodle Soup
teaser: Comforting homemade soup with tender chicken and egg noodles
steps: Poach chicken breasts in stock with herbs for 20 minutes
Remove chicken and shred with forks
Dice carrots, celery, and onion
Sauté vegetables in the pot until soft
Return stock to pot and bring to a boil
Add noodles and cook until tender
Return shredded chicken to soup
Season and garnish with fresh parsley

name: Stuffed Bell Peppers
teaser: Colorful peppers filled with seasoned rice, beef, and melted cheese
steps: Cut tops off peppers and remove seeds
Brown beef with onion and garlic
Mix beef with rice, half the tomatoes, and seasoning
Stuff peppers with the mixture
Place in baking dish and pour remaining tomatoes around
Cover and bake at 180°C for 40 minutes
Uncover, top with cheese, bake 10 more minutes
Garnish with parsley and serve

name: Smoothie Bowl
teaser: Thick blended fruits topped with seeds, nuts, and coconut
steps: Blend frozen bananas and mango with coconut milk
Add almond butter and blend until thick
Pour into a bowl
Arrange sliced kiwi on top
Sprinkle with coconut flakes
Add pumpkin seeds and goji berries
Serve immediately while cold

name: Ramen
teaser: Japanese noodle soup with rich broth, soft-boiled egg, and pork
steps: Simmer pork belly in stock for 40 minutes until tender
Soft-boil eggs for 7 minutes, then marinate in soy sauce
Whisk miso paste into the hot broth
Cook ramen noodles according to package
Slice pork belly thinly
Divide noodles among bowls
Ladle broth over noodles
Top with pork, halved egg, corn, nori, and green onions

name: Cobb Salad
teaser: Classic American salad with chicken, bacon, eggs, and blue cheese
steps: Grill chicken breasts and slice
Cook bacon until crispy and chop
Halve cherry tomatoes
Dice avocados
Quarter hard-boiled eggs
Chop lettuce and arrange on platter
Arrange all toppings in rows over lettuce
Crumble blue cheese on top and serve with ranch

name: Vegetable Curry
teaser: Fragrant Indian curry loaded with vegetables in coconut sauce
steps: Cube potatoes and break cauliflower into florets
Sauté onion and garlic until fragrant
Add curry powder and cook for 1 minute
Add tomatoes and coconut milk
Add potatoes and simmer for 15 minutes
Add cauliflower and chickpeas
Cook until vegetables are tender
Serve with cilantro and warm naan

name: Eggs Florentine
teaser: Poached eggs on spinach and English muffin with hollandaise
steps: Make hollandaise: whisk yolks, slowly add melted butter
Season with lemon juice and keep warm
Sauté spinach with garlic until wilted
Season with nutmeg
Toast English muffins
Poach eggs until whites are set
Layer: muffin, spinach, poached egg
Top with hollandaise and serve

name: Beef Stroganoff
teaser: Tender beef strips in creamy mushroom sauce over egg noodles
steps: Season and sear beef strips, set aside
Sauté onion and mushrooms in butter
Sprinkle flour and stir for 1 minute
Add beef stock and simmer until thickened
Return beef to pan
Stir in sour cream and heat through
Cook egg noodles
Serve stroganoff over noodles with parsley

name: Greek Salad
teaser: Fresh Mediterranean salad with tomatoes, cucumber, olives, and feta
steps: Cut tomatoes into wedges
Slice cucumber into half-moons
Thinly slice red onion
Slice bell pepper into rings
Combine vegetables in a bowl
Add olives
Place feta block on top
Drizzle with oil and vinegar, sprinkle oregano

name: Pulled Pork Sandwich
teaser: Slow-cooked pork shoulder in BBQ sauce on a soft brioche bun
steps: Rub pork with sugar, paprika, and spices
Place in slow cooker with onion and garlic
Cook on low for 8 hours or high for 4 hours
Shred pork with two forks
Mix with BBQ sauce and vinegar
Toast brioche buns
Pile pulled pork on buns
Top with coleslaw and serve

name: Huevos Rancheros
teaser: Mexican breakfast with fried eggs on tortillas with salsa and beans
steps: Warm black beans in a saucepan
Fry tortillas until slightly crispy
Fry eggs sunny-side up
Warm salsa in a pan
Place tortillas on plates
Spread beans on tortillas
Top with fried eggs and salsa
Garnish with avocado, cheese, and cilantro

name: Teriyaki Salmon Bowl
teaser: Glazed salmon over rice with edamame, cucumber, and pickled ginger
steps: Cook sushi rice according to package
Brush salmon with teriyaki and bake at 200°C for 15 minutes
Cook edamame and slice cucumber
Slice avocado
Divide rice among bowls
Flake salmon over rice
Arrange vegetables around salmon
Top with ginger, sesame seeds, and nori

name: Falafel Pita
teaser: Crispy chickpea fritters in warm pita with tahini and vegetables
steps: Blend soaked chickpeas with onion, garlic, and herbs
Add cumin and season well
Form into small patties
Deep fry at 180°C until golden brown
Warm pita bread
Slice tomatoes and cucumber
Fill pita with falafel and vegetables
Drizzle generously with tahini

name: Pork Chops with Apple Sauce
teaser: Pan-seared pork chops served with homemade cinnamon apple sauce
steps: Peel and dice apples
Simmer apples with butter, sugar, and cinnamon until soft
Mash to desired consistency
Season pork chops generously
Sear in hot pan for 4-5 minutes per side
Add sage to pan and baste chops
Rest for 5 minutes
Serve with warm apple sauce

name: Granola Bars
teaser: Chewy homemade bars with oats, honey, nuts, and dried fruit
steps: Preheat oven to 160°C
Toast oats for 10 minutes
Heat honey and almond butter until combined
Mix oats, nuts, cranberries, and chocolate
Pour honey mixture over and stir well
Press firmly into lined baking pan
Bake for 20 minutes until golden
Cool completely before cutting into bars

name: Clam Chowder
teaser: Creamy New England soup with tender clams, potatoes, and bacon
steps: Cook bacon until crispy, crumble and set aside
Sauté onion and celery in bacon fat
Add diced potatoes and clam juice
Simmer until potatoes are tender
Add clams and cream
Cook for 5 more minutes
Season with thyme, salt, and pepper
Serve with bacon bits and oyster crackers

name: Chicken Parmesan
teaser: Breaded chicken cutlets topped with marinara and melted mozzarella
steps: Mix breadcrumbs with grated parmesan
Dip chicken in beaten eggs, then breadcrumb mixture
Pan-fry chicken until golden on both sides
Place in baking dish
Top with marinara and mozzarella
Bake at 200°C for 15 minutes until cheese melts
Garnish with fresh basil
Serve over spaghetti

name: Chia Pudding
teaser: Creamy overnight pudding with chia seeds and coconut milk
steps: Whisk chia seeds with coconut milk
Add maple syrup and vanilla
Stir well to prevent clumps
Refrigerate overnight or at least 4 hours
Stir before serving
Top with diced mango
Add passion fruit pulp
Sprinkle with toasted coconut
